Recently,Frazieretal.investigatedhowperceivedagencyinfluencesperformanceandmoral

of the system [67]. Results from a different study suggest that communication abilities induce
perceivedmoralandsocialagency[43].However,moralagencyinanHCIcontexthasreceivedlittle
attention.Therefore,wesetouttoinvestigatetheperceivedmoralagencyofinteractivesystems,
specificallythatofmentalhealthchatbots.

on designing conversational user interfaces (CUI) that build meaningful, trusting interactions Conference Sponsors:
between humans and AI. With a background in AI and a passion for blending technology with SIGCHI
the arts, Ma aims to make conversations with machines as natural, engaging, and impactful as
those we have with each other. He believes that meaningful conversations—whether with people
or AI—are key to fostering trust, understanding, and connection.
